event: Contemporary expressionist scene with religious imagery
symbols: halos on figures — sanctity transposed into a modern context
rays of light from above — divine presence breaking into the contemporary world
airplane — modernity and the global context
church silhouette — the presence of faith in urban life
description: A bold, expressionist painting in vivid colors — oranges, blues, purples, and yellows. A large male figure fills the center, shown from the chest up, wearing a dark garment and holding or embracing a smaller figure (a child) with a golden halo. Above, a luminous figure emanates rays of golden light downward. Two airplanes fly in the dark sky. A church or cathedral silhouette appears at the right. The style is rough and energetic with heavy outlines and saturated color. Text or signatures appear at the lower corners.
